# The Synthetic Treatise

First point is contested.[^1] The argument continues on this line and then wraps down to a further line to exercise paragraph joining.

Second point follows directly after it.[^2]

[^1]: A note concerning cathedrals and central planning.

[^2]: A note concerning bazaars and emergent order.

## Chapter Two

Third point stands on its own here.[^3]

A closing paragraph without any markers, whose only job is to give the composer ordinary prose to assemble.

[^3]: A note concerning the commons and shared governance.
An epilogue page with plain text and no notes at all, so the running header repetition test has a third data point.
